description: baseline

use value embeddings in every layer instead of alternating layers

narrow local attention window from 128 to 64 while keeping final global layer
rebalance depth/width to 8 layers at roughly 320 dim while keeping the exp009 attention pattern
widen local sliding window to 192 while keeping the successful SSSS final-global pattern
add an early global attention layer before the successful final-global SSSS stack
ramp local sliding attention windows with depth before the final global layer
zero-center auxiliary value-embedding gate so the value path is learned from a neutral init
use four 80-dim attention heads instead of five 64-dim heads while keeping the exp009 final-global SSSS pattern
shrink SwiGLU FFN multiplier from 5x to 4x on the exp009 final-global stack
move auxiliary value embeddings to the final half of layers instead of alternating parity
use eight 40-dim attention heads instead of five 64-dim heads while keeping the exp009 final-global SSSS pattern
shift alternating value embeddings onto local layers so the final global layer uses pure projected values
widen the exp009 final-global SwiGLU stack from 320 to 384 model dim while keeping 6 layers
restrict auxiliary value embeddings to the final global layer
